case_title: JOHN SOTIROPOULOS VS. MARIETA ANGTUACA ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-21-2014 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY SOTIROPOULOS, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT ANGTUACA, MARIETA ABESAMIS, RUBEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-21-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE WAS $49.00 SERVED SEP-28-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ABESAMIS, RUBEN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-21-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-21-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SOTIROPOULOS, JOHN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ANGTUACA, MARIETA ABESAMIS, RUBEN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FPR SERVICE: $69.00 SERVED SEP-28-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ANGTUACA, MARIETA
